verdict: RES-5 closure reduces to all-order geometric domination r_k<1/2; base r_2~a0~0.096 (x5 below threshold; C_cm<10.4 needed, structural C_cm~O(1)); all-order domination is the residual

claims.name: closure_threshold_is_half
claims.detail: (geometric tail r/(1-r): at r=0.49 -> 0.961<1 (closes), at r=0.51 -> 1.041>1 (fails): the SUFFICIENT closure condition is r < 1/2)

claims.name: base_ratio_below_threshold
claims.detail: (base geometric ratio r_2 ~ a0 = 0.0957 < 1/2: factor ~5.2 below the closure threshold; the condensate-perturbation series starts well inside the convergence radius)

claims.name: operator_C_cm_margin
claims.detail: (closure needs C_cm < 1/a0 = 10.5; the structural C_cm ~ O(1) (base r_2/a0 ~ chi-ratio ~ 1) sits a factor ~10 below threshold -- wide margin IF the all-order domination holds)

claims.name: envelope_positive_at_base_ratio
claims.detail: (IF r_k <= a0=0.096 for all k, Delta F_exact = Delta F^(2)(1 - 0.106) = 0.894 Delta F^(2) > 0: closes with margin -- but the all-order r_k<=a0 is the RESIDUAL, not proved here)
